---
title: "super_computer"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| output: false

# Packages: spatial (sf), networks (sfnetworks, tidygraph, igraph), tables (dplyr),
# plotting (ggplot2, ggnewscale), data IO (readr), name cleaning (janitor).
library(sfnetworks)
library(sf)
library(tidygraph)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(janitor)
library(igraph)
library(ggnewscale)

# Load the two scripts
source("connectivity_function.R")
source("basin_network.R")
```

```{r}
#| label: load-dam-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Loading Current dams 
current_dams <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/GRanD_Version_1_3") |>
  clean_names()

# lon/lat columns expected by net_with_dams_from_hydrobasin).
future_dams <- read_csv("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/FHReD_2015_future_dams/FHReD_2015_future_dams_Zarfl_et_al_beta_version.csv") |>
  clean_names()

# Global river + FFR attributes
world_rivers_ffr <- readRDS("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/cleaned_v1/world_rivers_ffr.rds")

```

```{r}
#| label: load-HYBAS-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Hybas polygons to use LEVEL 3

basin_sf_africa <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_af_lev03_v1c/hybas_af_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

# basin_sf_Artctic <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_ar_lev03_v1c/hybas_ar_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
#   clean_names()

basin_sf_Asia <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_as_lev03_v1c/hybas_as_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_Aust <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_au_lev03_v1c/hybas_au_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_Europe_MidEast <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_eu_lev03_v1c/hybas_eu_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_Greenland <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_gr_lev03_v1c/hybas_gr_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_NorthCentAmerica <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_na_lev03_v1c/hybas_na_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_SouthAmerica <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_as_lev03_v1c/hybas_as_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()

basin_sf_Siberia <- read_sf("../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/raw/hybas_lev3/hybas_si_lev03_v1c/hybas_si_lev03_v1c.shp") |>
  clean_names()


# SPLIT Europe and Middle East 
# Europe Masks 
world <- spData::world
Europe <- world %>% 
  filter(continent == 'Europe') %>% 
  st_union() %>% 
  st_transform(crs = 'WGS84')

# Intersection of Europe and basin_sf_Europe_MidEast = EUROPE 
basin_sf_Europe <- st_filter(st_make_valid(basin_sf_Europe_MidEast), st_make_valid(Europe), .predicate = st_intersects)

# DISJOINT of Europe and basin_sf_Europe_MidEast = Middle East 
basin_sf_midEast <- st_filter(st_make_valid(basin_sf_Europe_MidEast), st_make_valid(Europe), .predicate = st_disjoint)


```

Prepping the Loop 
```{r}
#| label: gathering-HYBAS-data
# List basins 
basin_list <- list(basin_sf_africa, basin_sf_Asia, basin_sf_Aust, basin_sf_Europe, basin_sf_midEast, basin_sf_Greenland, basin_sf_NorthCentAmerica, basin_sf_SouthAmerica, basin_sf_Siberia)
```


Looping through all basin's hybas_id
```{r}
#| label: forloop-net-function

#for (basin in basin_list) {
for (i in seq_along(basin_list)) {
  for (hybas_id in basin_list[[i]]$hybas_id) {
    out <- tryCatch(net_with_dams_from_hydrobasin(
      current_dams      = current_dams,
      future_dams       = future_dams,
      basins_sf         = basin,
      world_rivers_ffr  = world_rivers_ffr,
      hybas_id          = hybas_id,
      #continent         = continent,
      ord_stra_min      = 3L,
      blend_tolerance_m = 50000
    ), 
    error = function(e) {
      message("Skipping", hybas_id, ": ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
    )
    
    if (is.null(out)) {
      message("Skipping:", hybas_id)
      next
    }
    
    saveRDS(
      out,
      sprintf(
        "../../../../../capstone/netzerohydro/data/cleaned_v1/nets_with_dams/net_hybas%s_%s_pfaf%s.rds",
        hybas_id,
        i,
        substr(as.character(hybas_id), 2, 3)
      )
    )
    
    message("hybas_id", hybas_id, "in the ", i, " basin complete. Moving to the next hybas_id.")
    
  }
}


```
